languages.text: "Не посмел{mf||а} ранее отвлекать вас от важных дел, Лорд-капитан. {name}, к вашим услугам".

traits.locale_text: "Не посмел{mf||а} ранее отвлекать вас от важных дел, Лорд-капитан. {name}, к вашим услугам".

languages.text: "I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."
languages.original_text: "Не посмел{mf||а} ранее отвлекать вас от важных дел, Лорд-капитан. {name}, к вашим услугам".

traits.locale_text: "I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."
"I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."
"I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."

languages.text: “此前，我不敢打扰您处理要务，舰长大人。我是{name}，听候您的差遣。”
languages.original_text: "I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."

traits.locale_text: “此前，我不敢打扰您处理要务，舰长大人。我是{name}，听候您的差遣。”

languages.text: « Il aurait été malvenu de ma part de vous interrompre alors que vous aviez plus urgent à faire, seigneur-capitaine. Je suis {name}, à votre service. »
languages.original_text: "I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."

traits.locale_text: « Il aurait été malvenu de ma part de vous interrompre alors que vous aviez plus urgent à faire, seigneur-capitaine. Je suis {name}, à votre service. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, no quería distraerle dada la gravedad de la situación. Soy {name}, a su servicio».
languages.original_text: "I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, no quería distraerle dada la gravedad de la situación. Soy {name}, a su servicio».

languages.text: "Sizi acil işlerinizden alıkoymaya cesaret edemedim Lord Kaptan. Adım {name}, emrinizdeyim."
languages.original_text: "I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."

traits.locale_text: "Sizi acil işlerinizden alıkoymaya cesaret edemedim Lord Kaptan. Adım {name}, emrinizdeyim."

languages.text: "Ich wollte Euch bis jetzt nicht von dringenden Angelegenheiten abhalten, Lord Captain. {name}, zu Euren Diensten."
languages.original_text: "I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."

traits.locale_text: "Ich wollte Euch bis jetzt nicht von dringenden Angelegenheiten abhalten, Lord Captain. {name}, zu Euren Diensten."

languages.text: 「今までは、重要な業務に集中されているあなたを、敢えて邪魔する事は出来ませんでした。艦長様、{name}でございます。」
languages.original_text: "I did not dare distract you from pressing matters before now, Lord Captain. {name}, at your service."

traits.locale_text: 「今までは、重要な業務に集中されているあなたを、敢えて邪魔する事は出来ませんでした。艦長様、{name}でございます。」
